name: OneMain Financial
description_short: Virginia Beach OneMain Financial at 4000 Virginia Beach Blvd provides personal loans to local residents and offers installment credit.
description_long:
The OneMain Financial branch located at 4000 Virginia Beach Blvd #132 in Virginia Beach, VA is a standalone lending office serving the local community. This full-service personal loan branch is open Monday through Friday with flexible hours—8:30 AM to 5:30 PM on Mondays, Wednesdays, and Fridays, and 9:00 AM to 5:30 PM on Tuesdays and Thursdays. The branch is closed on weekends.

At this Virginia Beach location, customers can apply for personal loans, installment credit, and other consumer lending products. The branch team can discuss loan terms, review your financial situation, and guide you through the application process. For specific questions about rates, terms, or to schedule a consultation, call 757-340-2513 during business hours.

If you're a Virginia Beach resident seeking a personal loan, this branch offers face-to-face lending service. Bring a valid government-issued ID, proof of income (recent pay stub or bank statement), and proof of address to speed up your application. The branch staff can answer questions about rates and terms specific to your situation.
address: 4000 Virginia Beach Blvd #132, Virginia Beach, VA 23452

company_info.headquarters: 4000 Virginia Beach Blvd #132, Virginia Beach, VA 23452

pros: No prepayment penalties—borrowers can pay off loans early without fees
Fixed rates and fixed monthly payments with no surprise charges if paid on time
Same-day funding available in as little as 1 hour after closing through SpeedFunds debit card feature
Pre-qualification available online, by phone, or in-branch without affecting credit score
Flexible loan purposes including auto, debt consolidation, medical, home improvement, and lifestyle expenses
Physical branch locations with loan specialists offering in-person guidance and after-hours appointment availability
Loan amounts from $1,500–$30,000 with terms of 24–60 months, providing customizable repayment periods
cons: Maximum APR of 35.99% is substantially higher than conventional personal loan rates and approaches predatory lending thresholds
Minimum loan amount of $1,500 excludes consumers needing smaller emergency funds under $1,500
Wide APR range (11.99%–35.99%) means most applicants will likely qualify for rates in the higher end depending on credit profile
Requires multiple documentation types at closing (identity, residence, income), which may delay funding for some applicants
Branch-dependent model for certain services means consumers without nearby locations must rely on phone or online channels
best_for: Borrowers with fair-to-poor credit seeking fixed-rate loans with transparent terms and no prepayment penalties
Consumers needing rapid access to $1,500–$30,000 for specific expenses (debt consolidation, medical bills, auto repair, home improvement)
Applicants prioritizing in-person service and guidance from loan specialists over fully digital processes
Borrowers comfortable with higher APRs in exchange for accessibility, speed, and predictable monthly payments
diagnosis: OneMain Financial is best for fair-to-poor credit borrowers seeking accessible, transparent personal loans with rapid funding and in-person support. The primary caveat is the high maximum APR (35.99%), which significantly increases borrowing costs compared to conventional lenders and requires careful evaluation of total repayment obligation before accepting an offer.
services: Same-day funding via SpeedFunds debit card disbursement
In-branch loan closing and face-to-face consultations
meta_description: OneMain Financial at 4000 Virginia Beach Blvd, Virginia Beach, VA. Personal loans and installment credit for local residents.
